faq.title: Payment FAQ
faq.q1a4: Virtual Account (BCA, BRI, BNI, Mandiri, etc.)
faq.q2a: Yes, all payment transactions are processed through a secure and encrypted payment gateway system. Your payment data is not stored by our system.
faq.q3: How long does payment verification take?
faq.q3a: Payments using E-Wallet and QRIS are usually verified automatically within seconds. For bank transfers, the process may take 1-5 minutes depending on the bank system.
faq.q4aIntro: Some common causes of failed payments:
faq.q4a3: Internet connection was interrupted during payment
faq.q5a: Unpaid transactions will be automatically canceled by the system after the payment deadline. If already paid, the transaction cannot be canceled.
faq.q6: What if my balance is deducted but status is not successful yet?
faq.q6aIntro: If your balance has been deducted but transaction status is not successful yet:
faq.q6a2: Check transaction status again on history page
faq.q6aOutro: If the issue persists, contact Customer Service immediately and include payment proof.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: Is it safe to top up on Pakargaming?
faq.a1: Yes, 100% safe. You don't need to log in to your game account. Just enter your User ID / Server ID and pay. Items are delivered automatically while your data stays protected.
faq.q2: How long until items reach my account?
faq.a2: Usually within seconds after payment succeeds.
faq.q3: What payment methods are available on Pakargaming?
faq.q4: How do I find my ID?
faq.q4s2: Tap the profile icon on the home screen
faq.q4s3: Find your ID number under your character name
faq.q4s4: Copy it and use it when topping up on Pakargaming
faq.q5: Why hasn't my item arrived after paying?
faq.q5intro: If it still hasn't arrived after 15 minutes, check:
faq.q5b1: Whether your User ID is correct
faq.q5outro: If issues remain, contact Pakargaming support via Chat / WhatsApp.
faq.q6intro: Yes! Discounts and events—follow Pakargaming official social media for updates.
